data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for location permits with time windows.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific requirement for 'Location permits with time windows', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations related to this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for location permits, yet there are no prior steps or evidence that demonstrate how the system handles or verifies these permits. This indicates a lack of sufficient evidence to conclusively determine whether the requirement is satisfied.
gaps: No evidence provided to confirm the implementation of location permits with time windows.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add validation for location permits
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the scheduling system enforces location permits with specified time windows.
